---
name: '✨ Feature Request'
about: Propose a new feature or functionality for SariSari.
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement, feature
assignees: ''
---

## User Story / Problem Statement

<!-- Who is this feature for and what problem does it solve? -->

**As a** [sari-sari store owner / contributor],
**I want** [a feature or change],
**So that** [benefit, value, or goal].

## Proposed Solution

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## Mockups / Visual Ideas

<!-- If applicable, describe how you think it should look or attach sketches. Remember the warm, cozy receipt-paper aesthetic! -->

## Hard Offline-First Compliance

<!-- SariSari is 100% offline-first. Explain how this feature will work without any network connection. -->

- How will the data be stored locally?
- Are there any network actions required? (If yes, how is this handled gracefully when offline?)

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. -->
